title: scabiosa lusitanica
intro: Scabiosa lusitanica, also known as Lusitanian scabious, is a perennial herb in the borage family that is native to the Iberian Peninsula. Traditionally, it has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as its ability to soothe digestive issues. The health benefits associated with Scabiosa lusitanica include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Herbal preparations of Scabiosa lusitanica can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to promote overall well-being and alleviate symptoms of colds, fever, and digestive discomfort.
